items.label: BAT 1+2
items.how_to: Both battery switches ON on overhead panel.

items.label: External Power
items.how_to: If available, connect and switch ON external power.

items.label: APU Master
items.how_to: APU master switch ON.

items.label: APU Start
items.how_to: APU start switch ON. Wait for AVAIL on ECAM.

items.label: APU Bleed
items.how_to: APU bleed switch ON for air conditioning and engine start.

items.label: NAV Lights
items.how_to: Navigation lights ON.

items.label: ADIRS
items.how_to: All three ADIRS selectors to NAV. Alignment ~7 minutes.

items.label: Fuel Pumps
items.how_to: All fuel pump switches ON.

items.label: FROM/TO
items.how_to: Enter departure and destination airports in MCDU INIT page.

items.label: Flight Number
items.how_to: Enter flight number on INIT page.

items.label: Cost Index
items.how_to: Enter cost index on INIT page.

items.label: Cruise FL
items.how_to: Enter cruise flight level on INIT page.

items.label: Route
items.how_to: Enter or load flight plan route via F-PLN page.

items.label: PERF
items.how_to: Enter V1, VR, V2, FLEX temp, and flap setting on PERF TAKEOFF page.

items.label: ZFW/CG
items.how_to: Enter zero fuel weight and center of gravity on INIT B page.

items.label: Signs
items.how_to: Seatbelt signs ON, No smoking AUTO.

items.label: Windows/Doors
items.how_to: Verify all doors and windows closed on ECAM DOOR page.

items.label: Beacon
items.how_to: Beacon ON before requesting pushback.

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Parking brake ON.

items.label: Thrust Levers
items.how_to: Both thrust levers at IDLE.

items.label: Transponder
items.how_to: Transponder to STBY before pushback.

items.label: ENG Mode Selector
items.how_to: Engine mode selector to IGN/START.

items.label: Engine 2 Master
items.how_to: Engine 2 master switch ON. Monitor N2 rising.

items.label: Engine 1 Master
items.how_to: Engine 1 master switch ON.

items.label: ENG Mode Selector
items.how_to: Engine mode selector back to NORM after both engines started.

items.label: APU Bleed
items.how_to: APU bleed OFF (engines provide bleed air now).

items.label: Anti Ice
items.how_to: Engine and wing anti-ice as required by conditions.

items.label: Flight Controls
items.how_to: Move sidestick full deflections, check ECAM F/CTL page.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Set flaps to takeoff configuration (1+F, 2, or 3).

items.label: Ground Spoilers
items.how_to: Ground spoilers ARMED.

items.label: Auto Brake
items.how_to: Auto brake to MAX for rejected takeoff.

items.label: Pitch Trim
items.how_to: Verify pitch trim set per takeoff data.

items.label: ECAM Status
items.how_to: Review ECAM STATUS page — no unexpected messages.

items.label: Taxi Clearance
items.how_to: Request and receive taxi clearance.

items.label: Nosewheel Steering
items.how_to: Verify nosewheel steering response.

items.label: Brakes
items.how_to: Test brakes during initial taxi.

items.label: Runway Turn Off Lights
items.how_to: Runway turn off lights ON for taxi.

items.label: Takeoff Briefing
items.how_to: Confirm takeoff speeds, SID, engine failure procedure.

items.label: TCAS
items.how_to: Transponder to TA/RA, verify squawk.

items.label: Packs
items.how_to: Packs 1+2 ON (or OFF for short runway performance).

items.label: Strobe Lights
items.how_to: Strobe lights ON.

items.label: Landing Lights
items.how_to: Both landing lights ON.

items.label: T.O Config
items.how_to: Press T.O CONFIG button — verify no ECAM warnings.

items.label: Thrust
items.how_to: Advance thrust levers to FLX or TOGA detent. Verify SRS mode.

items.label: 100 Knots
items.how_to: PNF calls '100 knots' — verify speed alive.

items.label: V1
items.how_to: PNF calls 'V1'.

items.label: Rotate
items.how_to: At VR, smoothly rotate to SRS pitch guidance.

items.label: Positive Climb
items.how_to: On positive climb, call 'Gear Up'.

items.label: Gear
items.how_to: Verify gear up.

items.label: Autopilot
items.how_to: Engage AP1 above acceleration altitude.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Retract flaps per speed schedule (S speed, then F speed, then green dot).

items.label: Thrust
items.how_to: Thrust levers to CL detent for managed climb thrust.

items.label: Cruise Altitude
items.how_to: Verify at planned cruise flight level.

items.label: Fuel Prediction
items.how_to: Monitor MCDU FUEL PRED page.

items.label: ECAM
items.how_to: Periodic scan of ECAM for any advisories.

items.label: Approach Briefing
items.how_to: Brief approach type, minima, missed approach, runway.

items.label: Landing Data
items.how_to: Enter landing data on MCDU PERF APPR page (QNH, wind, VAPP).

items.label: Auto Brake
items.how_to: Set auto brake (LO, MED, or as required).

items.label: Barometric Setting
items.how_to: Set QNH when below transition level.

items.label: APPR Mode
items.how_to: Press APPR button on FCU — verify LOC and G/S armed.

items.label: Gear
items.how_to: Landing gear DOWN, verify 3 green on ECAM.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Set flaps to landing configuration.

items.label: Ground Spoilers
items.how_to: Verify ground spoilers ARMED.

items.label: Landing Lights
items.how_to: Landing lights ON.

items.label: Minimums
items.how_to: At decision altitude/height: 'Continue' or 'Go Around'.

items.label: Flare
items.how_to: At 20ft RETARD callout — idle thrust, flare.

items.label: Reverse Thrust
items.how_to: Select reverse thrust if needed.

items.label: Decelerate
items.how_to: Cancel reverse by 70 knots. Verify autobrake.

items.label: Spoilers
items.how_to: Ground spoilers retract.

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Flaps retract.

items.label: Strobe
items.how_to: Strobe lights OFF.

items.label: APU
items.how_to: Start APU for gate arrival.

items.label: Transponder
items.how_to: Transponder to STBY.

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Parking brake SET at gate.

items.label: Engines
items.how_to: Both engine master switches OFF.

items.label: Seatbelt Signs
items.how_to: Seatbelt signs OFF.

items.label: Beacon
items.how_to: Beacon OFF.

items.label: External Power
items.how_to: Switch to external power if available.

items.label: Fuel Pumps
items.how_to: All fuel pump switches OFF.

items.label: APU
items.how_to: APU master switch OFF when external power connected.
